sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41347" key="e)pith/qh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιτήθη</orth> or <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιτηδ-τηθή</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n41347.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">great-grandmother,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0513.tlg001:42" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theopomp.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">42</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="2" id="n41347.1" level="3" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">great-great-grandmother,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:3:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
